title: Senior Data Scientist
highlights: Co-led a company-wide data science and analytics mentorship program with hundreds of internal applicants each year.
Designed and implemented automated analytics workflows that transformed complex behavioral insights into revenue-generating data narratives.
Drove measurable increases in sales team productivity and advertising revenue through scalable insights tooling.
Evangelized innovative products, tools, and methodologies to business leaders and cross-functional partners from ideation to scaled solutions.

title: Data Scientist
highlights: 3x company-wide hackathon award winner for stop-gap automated analytical tools that yielded around $10M in cost savings and led to fully productized work streams.
Co-led a company-wide data science and analytics mentorship program with hundreds of internal applicants each half.
Led development of an Insights Innovation pod focusing on methodologies, models, tools, and metrics to derive new behavioral insights and answer vexing business questions.
Awarded best lightning talk for an interest-based clustering project during an applied machine learning program.
Productized analytical insights, methodologies, and tools into external and internal products in partnership with sales, product, and engineering.

title: Insights Analyst
highlights: Solely owned development, maintenance, and global deployment of an end-to-end analytical insights tool tied to over $65M of revenue in 2021 (Python, SQL, Spark).
Designed, built, and deployed internal analytical tools that used natural language processing and network theory to glean insights from primary search data.
Collaborated with product and engineering teams to scale analytical tools and methodologies across the organization.
Translated complex problems into actionable decisions for non-technical stakeholders using both quantitative and qualitative approaches.

title: Associate
highlights: Developed algorithms in Python and R to analyze asset-backed securities data for statistical analysis.
Designed scalable extractive text summarization pipelines to OCR, clean, and extract key information from documents.
Built in-house analytical tools to streamline data processes for outputs of computer simulations, multivariable regression models, and data analysis.
Collaborated with economists, statisticians, and data analysts to perform quantitative analysis for major law firms and financial institutions.

title: Python Developer
highlights: Collaborated on developing a 25-week online course for quantitative finance using Python.
Developed custom Python programs to report and visualize data in the cloud as daily dashboards using Plotly, WSJ, and Yahoo APIs.
Contributed weekly written analysis on market volatility, economic variables, and cryptocurrencies.

title: Director of Professional Development
highlights: Helped organize one of the largest student-run investment conferences on the West Coast in 2017.
Led groups of 30+ students in meetings on business etiquette, data analytics, and stock valuation.
Managed a team that analyzed the TMT sector and pitched stocks using discounted cash flow models.

title: Panetta Institute Intern
highlights: Completed a nationally recognized fellowship program under former Secretary of Defense Leon Panetta.
Conducted research on nuclear, technology, and data policy using congressional resources to support staffers drafting legislation.
Attended Senate and House hearings on data privacy, national security, artificial intelligence, and blockchain.
Researched and published policy analysis on emerging technologies.

title: Data Analyst Intern
highlights: Played an instrumental role in developing a MySQL database for financial data.
Integrated data from Salesforce, Excel, and other systems using Python and APIs.
Ran and optimized SQL scripts to extract information for downstream data analysis.
